company.name: GLOBUS MEDICAL INC
company.security: Globus Medical, Inc. Class A Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: price/sales 3.9283, operating profit 0.48B, normalized NI proxy 0.49B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 2453.43% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 23.65x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 59.71% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
commentaryZh: FY 2025：市销率 3.9283，营业利润 0.48B，扣非净利润代理值 0.49B。
扣非净利润代理值同比增速为 2453.43%，趋势改善。
近 3 年营收几何增速为 36.88%。
基于当前市值得到的扣非净利润市盈率代理值为 23.65 倍。
按 3 年营收几何增速投射，未来 5 年市值回收率为 59.71%。
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodologyZh: 扣费净利润代理值 = 净利润 - 股权激励费用。
扣非净利润代理值 = 扣费净利润代理值 - 特殊项目绝对值。
5 年市值回收率 = 未来 5 年扣非净利润代理值预测总和 / 当前市值。
增长投射默认使用 3 年营收几何增速。
